full_text: .My name is Owen.And this marks my 10001 demise.Here stands the final volcano.Perhaps instant vaporization won't be as painful.It remains quite painful.My name is Owen.The final unaltered human on this world.I seek a flawless sin, devoid of pain's touch.嗯。One where there is no perception of pain.This marks my 101st death simulation trial.Moss for a pain index comparison.Rather than becoming them.Became a slave of the ancient God.A death without pain.Should be considered the best release, I suppose.Our reality anchor reserves are running on Humes.Oops, I stayed in the simulated volcano for too long.The reality anchor has been turned off moss replenish energy immediately and restart the reality anchor now adding.Count down to four minutes.They're approaching.It's too late.What is that.Where am I.It's them.It hurts so much.Is this the cold embrace of true death?了这子。🎼And is须一定 be LD来.Webo successful, reality has been anchored once more.Whether to delete the death simulation file.
